"
scrape_twitter.py
------------------
TASK 1: WEB SCRAPING
Internship: CodeAlpha Data Analytics
Topic: Public conversation on Electric Vehicle (EV) Adoption (India & Global)

OVERVIEW
========
This script collects tweets mentioning EV-related keywords/hashtags and
writes them to a CSV with the schema used throughout this project:

    tweet_id, date, time, username, verified, followers_count, text,
    hashtags, brand_mentioned, location, likes, retweets, replies,
    quotes, sentiment_label, language

Two collection backends are provided:

  1. TWEEPY (RECOMMENDED) - uses the official X/Twitter API v2 with a
     Bearer Token. This is the compliant, ToS-respecting way to collect
     data at scale and is what should be used for any real submission.

  2. SNSCRAPE (NO API KEY) - a community scraping library that queries
     Twitter's public search without authentication. Useful for small,
     ad-hoc pulls, but breaks frequently when X changes its frontend, and
     should be used carefully and at a low request rate.

NOTE ON THIS SUBMISSION
========================
This script is fully functional and ready to run in an environment with
internet access and (for the Tweepy path) a valid Bearer Token. The
sandboxed analysis environment used to prepare this report has no social
media API credentials and a restricted outbound network allowlist, so it
cannot execute live network calls to api.twitter.com. To keep the
downstream EDA/Visualization tasks reproducible, `generate_dataset.py`
was used to produce a schema-identical sample dataset for analysis. When
you run this script with your own credentials, simply point
`eda.py` / `visualize.py` at the CSV it produces - no other code changes
are required.

ETHICAL & LEGAL NOTES
======================
- Always check the platform's robots.txt and Terms of Service before
  scraping. X's ToS restricts scraping outside the official API for
  commercial use.
- Respect rate limits - this script uses exponential backoff and sleeps
  between requests.
- Only collect public data; never attempt to access private accounts or
  circumvent authentication.
- Store collected personal data (usernames, text) responsibly and only
  for the stated analytical purpose.
"
Requires: a valid X API v2 Bearer Token with Essential/Elevated access.
